mnemonics: DIGITAL over PHYSICAL: Dematerialization Is Giving A Link Over Possessing Heavy, Inefficient, Costly, Unsustainable Logistics
keyPoints: Replacing physical products with digital services (e.g., e-books, streaming, cloud software)
Reducing or eliminating material use and transportation throughout the product lifecycle
Decreasing the overall environmental footprint, including energy use and e-waste, from production to disposal
commonMistakes: Assuming dematerialization always leads to a net positive environmental impact without considering the energy use of data centers and networks
Overlooking the entire product chain and only focusing on the end-user product (e.g., ignoring the resources needed for the digital infrastructure)
